name: Emoticons I
recipeInstructions:
1. An emoticon is a figure created with keyboard symbols that represent facial expressions or emotions.
2. To read an emoticon, tilt your head to the left.
3. The meanings of various emoticons are as follows:
- :-) Semi-Smiley
- :-] Smiley blockhead
- :-% has beard
- :-o singing national anthem
- :-t is cross
- :-( Drama
- :-) Comedy
- :- Male
- :-? smoking a pipe
- :-\ Undecided
- :-p) sticking tongue out
- :-> tends to drool
- :-| has a cold
- :-) well dressed
- :-D talks too much
- :-# lips are sealed
- :-o shocked
- :-)-{8 User is a big girl
- :-o surprised
- :-{ a mustache
- :-% has beard
- :-& tongue-tied
- :-9 licking lips
- :-( Sad
- :-> Hey hey
- :-X Wearing a bow tie
- :-0 an orator
- :-#| bushy mustache
- :-@ User face screaming
- :-% a banker
- :-} wearing lipstick
- :-) Humor (or smiley)
- :-v Talking head Smiley
- :-c Bummed out Smiley
- :-e Disappointed Smiley
- :-< Real sad Smiley
- :-( Boo hoo
- :-8 ( Condescending stare
- :-# My lips are sealed
- :-O Uh oh
- :-Q Smoker
- ::-) wearing glasses
- User has two noses
- Midget Smiley
- User has a big nose
- User has acne
- Winking Smiley
- Needing a haircut
- Smiley with big face
- Wearing toupee
- Pope
- Smiley priest
- Wry and winking
- Bozo
- Dunce
- Chinese
- Hosehead
- Female
